title: Smoker Watches the Chaos
description: On pages 9–12, smoker watches the chaos focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as buggy captures Luffy at the place where Gold Roger died, turning Loguetown into a crisis.
scene: On pages 9–12, smoker watches the chaos focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as buggy captures Luffy at the place where Gold Roger died, turning Loguetown into a crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: What's that bounty Hunter doing here now of all times!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That he's a member of the straw hat pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: In any case, we've got to bring that execution stand down!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Gyaha hahaha! Just watch care- fully from there!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: witness the last moments of your captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If I can just kick down that execution stand...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Come down here and fight me, coward!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If I could just cut down that execution stand...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Have all units prepare for battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But it looks like I'm dead.

summary: This part turns Loguetown into a trap, bringing old enemies and Marine pressure together around Luffy.
